description: Rank models by ATC + purchase events, not by offline eval scores. Cheapest performant model wins.

panels.title: 🏆 Which model is winning right now?
panels.description: Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

Top 10 models ranked by real Add-to-Cart events in the last hour, parsed from the `atc_event` Loki log stream emitted by the add_to_cart tool. ATC is a real business outcome — eval scores are theory.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

targets.expr:
topk(10, sum by (model) (count_over_time(
  {service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event"
  | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>`
  [1h]
)))

panels.title: 🤖 Which models drove the most Add-to-Carts? (1h)

panels.description:
Same data as the bar chart on the left, laid out as a horizontal leaderboard. Uses the real `atc_event` Loki log stream.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

targets.expr:
topk(10, sum by (model) (count_over_time(
  {service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event"
  | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>`
  [1h]
)))

panels.title: 🔥 ATC leaderboard — same data, leaderboard view (1h)
📈 How is each model trending — and which is cheapest per ATC?
panels.description: Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

Real Add-to-Cart events per minute per model over time (5m sliding window), parsed from the `atc_event` Loki log stream. Watch one model rise as another falls during model rotations.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

targets.expr:
sum by (model) (rate(
  {service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event"
  | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>`
  [5m]
)) * 60

panels.title: ATC rate per model (events/min)

panels.description:
Actual USD per Add-to-Cart per model (1h). Numerator is the Prometheus cost rate for the nc-gift-finder specialist (USD/hour); denominator is real ATC events/hour from the Loki `atc_event` log stream. Lowest = best $-efficiency. Join is done in the panel via a `Binary operation` transformation (cost ÷ ATC) since the data sources are mixed.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

targets.expr:
sum by (model) (count_over_time(
  {service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event"
  | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>`
  [1h]
))

panels.title: 💸 USD per Add-to-Cart (1h, lower is better)
📋 The full scorecard — every metric, every model
panels.description: Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

One row per model with every signal you need to pick a winner: real Add-to-Cart events (Loki `atc_event` log stream), conversion rate (ATC ÷ LLM calls), p50 latency, and USD per ATC (cost rate ÷ ATC count). The Conversion % and USD per ATC columns are computed in the panel via `Binary operation` transformations (Prom + Loki joined by model). Sort by any column. All numbers are 1h windows.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

targets.expr:
sum by (model) (count_over_time(
  {service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event"
  | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>`
  [1h]
))

panels.title: 🏁 Full leaderboard — ATC, conversion, latency, $ per ATC (1h)
💰 Cost vs latency — what's each model costing and how fast is it?
panels.description: Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.

Stacked **USD per hour** by model (5m rate × 3600). Whichever band is widest is currently eating your budget. Anthropic models tend to dominate even at low call volumes because they're ~10× the per-token price of Ollama-local.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.
panels.title: 💰 Spend rate per model (USD/hour)

panels.description:
p95 of gen_ai client request duration per model — 95 out of 100 calls finish faster than this. Spikes here mean tail-latency pain that users will feel.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.
panels.title: ⏱ How slow is the worst 5% of requests per model? (p95)
🆚 Ollama vs Claude — the case for routing to local models

panels.description:
USD spent per 1M tokens processed, last 24h. Higher = pricier per unit of work. Claude lines up at the top, Ollama at the bottom — which is exactly why routing decisions matter.

Post-2026-05-16 retune: Anthropic is Haiku-only; Sonnet/Opus rows in this panel are historical.
panels.title: 💵 USD per 1M tokens — top 10 models (24h)

panels.description: 24h gateway-attributed spend split by provider. The gateway counter covers BOTH the local Ollama pool and Anthropic-Haiku (the only Claude model on the rotation post-2026-05-16). For Sigil eval-judge spend (Bedrock) cross-reference the ai-obs-finops dashboard.
panels.title: Spend by provider (24h) — Ollama vs Anthropic-Haiku
🔄 Is the Ollama lockstep rotation actually rotating?

panels.description: Every Ollama-bound specialist in the cluster flips to the SAME model every 5 minutes (epoch_seconds // 300 % len(pool)). You should see one model band dominant per ~5-minute slice with clean handoffs. If colors mix mid-slice, rotation is broken on some pod.
panels.title: 🔄 Lockstep rotation timeline — one model per 5-minute slice
